arts.ttl: 'I drove my exit from Man Utd because I knew it was time, but now I have to a fight'
arts.sum: The defender opened up on why he had to leave Old Trafford to start a new chapter with Cardiff City

arts.ttl: Man Utd target surprise DOUBLE DEAL amid transfer woes
arts.sum: Manchester United are reportedly hoping to sign Crystal Palace duo Adam Wharton and Jean-Philippe Mateta during the 2025 summer transfer window. In addition, Spanish outlet Fichajes have claimed that Man Utd are also interested in signing Wharton, although Crystal Palace currently value the 21-year-old at a whopping €80 million, which could prove to be a stumbling block for the Red Devils.

arts.ttl: Leicester City predicted line-up v Manchester United with three changes made
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy is set to name a full-strength Leicester City starting line-up in the FA Cup once again after describing the competition as a “privilege” to play in. For QPR, the City boss was looking to rediscover the winning feeling after a run of defeats, but now he’s keen to show the FA Cup and a trip to Old Trafford the reverence they deserve, especially as his players will have a full week to recover before their next Premier League fixture.

arts.ttl: Man Utd star Christian Eriksen told his career is over as Danish icon makes brutal retirement call
arts.sum: The veteran has struggled for game time since Ruben Amorim's arrival at Old Trafford and looks set to leave the Red Devils this summer

arts.ttl: Manchester United rising star receives exciting offer after 'impressing' Ruben Amorim
arts.sum: Godwill Kukonki has been promoted to Man Utd's first-team training by Ruben Amorim and has a bright future ahead.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim rules Man Utd FA Cup hero out of Leicester clash in fresh injury blow
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim is dealing with a mounting injury crisis at Manchester United, with the boss forced back to the drawing board after another blow on the eve of the clash with Leicester

arts.ttl: Manchester United ready to make ‘significant loss’ on transfer and accept £40m
arts.sum: Rasmus Hojlund has had a disappointing season at Manchester United so far. The Dane has scored only twice in the Premier League and his performances have been far from impressive. He’s faced criticism for his contribution and there’s inevitably been Italian media talk about a return to Serie A. arts.ttl: “A bit ridiculous” – Insider comments on Manchester United January transfer saga
arts.sum: Former Manchester United scout Mick Brown has slammed the “ridiculous” idea of the club potentially selling Alejandro Garnacho in the January transfer window. There were plenty of strong rumours about Garnacho possibly leaving Man Utd, and Brown has given his response.
